title: Execute Phase 1 (Quick Wins) of test coverage remediation plan
author: testing_infrastructure-advisor
summary: Framework has only 5% test coverage (11/14 E2E tests passing, 0 unit tests, 0 integration tests). Current testing pyramid is inverted. TEST-COVERAGE-REPORT.md (March 18) identifies 42 needed unit tests and 21 integration tests. Phase 1 (Quick Wins) targets: establish pytest infrastructure, fix 3 failing tests, add 5 critical unit tests.
perceive: Root causes: (1) Framework is template-based with minimal Python code to test; (2) Test infrastructure incomplete (no tests/unit/, empty tests/integration/); (3) Three test failures not yet resolved (wai.md sections, inbox routing rules, unspecified E2E failure). Testing pyramid is backwards — all E2E, no unit/integration.
execute: 1. Create tests/unit/ directory and pytest fixture infrastructure
2. Fix wai.md section mismatch: align test expectations with current wai.md structure
3. Document inbox routing rules (delivery_confirmation, phone-home) in skill file
4. Investigate and fix unspecified E2E test failure
5. Implement 5 critical unit tests: (a) Lug schema validation (basic), (b) Skill registry validation (basic), (c) WAI-State.json schema, (d) spoke_id generation, (e) File index load policy
6. Run pytest; expect 5 new passing unit tests and all 3 previously-failing E2E tests now passing
acceptance_criteria: tests/unit/ directory exists with 5 passing unit test files
All 3 previously-failing E2E tests now pass (11/14 → 14/14)
pytest can run on both unit and integration tests
Test coverage report updated with new baseline metrics
Inbox routing rules documented in wai-commands.md or skills reference
